Hardware Component File

MMC_HECM_20191218

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference MMC_HECM_20191218_20200109T172143.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA15F1
Receive ID 18DAF115
Functional Addr 15
Functional Name ECM_29
